---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What trading problem does this solve?**
Describe the gap from a trader's perspective.

**Proposed solution**
How should it work?

**Alternatives considered**
What else could solve this?

**Which category?**
- [ ] What to buy (structure selection)
- [ ] When to buy (entry levels)
- [ ] How much to buy (sizing)
- [ ] When to exit (exit management)
- [ ] Risk management
- [ ] New broker integration
- [ ] Data source
- [ ] Other
